subcodes.first_line: This is the Day when from the rustling of its winds is heard: "There is none other God but Me, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise," and from the murmur of its waters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم یمسع من هزیز اریاحه انه لا اله الا انا العلیم الحکیم و من خریر مائه
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
